title: dioscorea ancachsensis
intro: Dioscorea ancachsensis is a plant species belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family, commonly known as the yam family. It is native to Peru and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Dioscorea ancachsensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
